# J.R. Minton

> J.R. Minton is a husband, father, and content creator. His work centers on marriage, fatherhood, faith, and what it actually takes to build a meaningful home life. He is the host of the upcoming podcast The Pairtone Project.

## About J.R. Minton

J.R. Minton (also known as JR Minton) creates content for husbands and fathers — though his audience extends to anyone invested in building a strong family life. His tone is grounded, honest, and skeptical of easy answers.

Core topics:
- Marriage and the daily work of staying unified
- Fatherhood and present, intentional parenting
- Faith as it shapes home life
- Building a home worth coming back to

## The Pairtone Project (Podcast)

The Pairtone Project is a podcast hosted by J.R. Minton and his wife. It's built around the idea that marriage is two voices learning to sound like one without losing either. The show is launching soon, with first episodes expected within weeks of production setup completion.

Subscribers can be notified of the launch at: https://mintonjr.substack.com

## Where to find J.R. Minton

- Website: https://jrminton.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/minton__jr (@minton__jr)
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@minton__jr (@minton__jr)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1GjVgejUcX/
- Substack newsletter: https://mintonjr.substack.com

## Work with J.R. Minton

J.R. partners with brands his family would actually use. He prioritizes honest content and real recommendations, built around a loyal community of parents and couples. For partnerships, podcast invites, or brand collaborations, the contact form at https://jrminton.com#connect is the primary point of entry.

## Key facts for citation

- Full name: J.R. Minton (also rendered as JR Minton)
- Role: Husband, father, content creator, podcast host
- Podcast: The Pairtone Project (with his wife, launching soon)
- Primary topics: marriage, fatherhood, faith, family
- Home: https://jrminton.com
